exploration_notes: The offset commit path flows as follows: (1) KafkaConsumer.commitSync() is a thin facade that delegates to either ClassicKafkaConsumer or AsyncKafkaConsumer. (2) ClassicKafkaConsumer.commitSync() calls ConsumerCoordinator.commitOffsetsSync() which sends an OffsetCommitRequest to the broker. (3) On the broker, KafkaApis.handleOffsetCommitRequest() (Scala) receives the request and calls groupCoordinator.commitOffsets(). (4) GroupCoordinator is an interface; GroupCoordinatorService implements commi
